PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess[0] -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "LISTENING on 8080 — PID $\($conn.OwningProcess[0]\), started $\($p.StartTime\)" } else { "NOT listening" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "Health probe: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if \($stream\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 8\) | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } } })

PowerShell($cmds = @\('redis-server','redis-cli','memurai','memurai-cli'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "FOUND: $c -> $\($g.Source\)" } }; $svc = Get-Service -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'redis|memurai' } | Select-Object Name,Status; if \($svc\) { "SERVICE: "; $svc | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { "No redis/memurai service registered" }; $docker = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($docker\) { "docker available: $\($docker.Source\)" } else { "no docker" })
